memories.content: Waves 1-10 CRUD (2026-01-14). Market Data Pipeline 253K (2026-02-05). ReportSettings + Zod (2026-02-07). Sales Analysis (2026-02-10). Construction Pipeline (2026-02-11). UW Model Grouping Phase 3-4 (2026-03-03). Activity logging, Docker, Tech Debt, Extraction Hardening (2026-02-12→03-03). Login Flow + Auth Guards (2026-03-03). Local OneDrive Extraction (2026-03-03). Deals Overhaul + v5 (2026-03-04). Group Pipeline Frontend, Vite opt (2026-03-05). Cap Rate TC T3 re-run + 49 regression tests (2026-03-05). UW Grouping Expansion: 9 groups, 66 files (2026-03-06). Proforma Returns UI Option C (2026-03-06). Phase 2-3 Dashboard Integrity (2026-03-06). Phase 4 Final Gate (2026-03-09). Architecture review v2: 71/71 findings resolved (100%) — 69 Done + 2 Accepted Risk. Key batches: 8599ec2, a6b0685, f65dc05, 5164070, 0d00b35, 584fd2c, e8e12ce. Final batch: F-018 catch-up migration, F-042 VARCHAR CHECK constraints, F-056/F-063 accepted risk.

conda env: dashboard-backend. Dev: npm run dev:all (auto-opens Edge). Git: stash apply over pop, don't push unless asked. NO mock/fake data. User: matt@bandrcapital.com / Wildcats777!! / admin. User expects Agent Team approach from docs/agent-team-reference.md. Don't tunnel-vision on grep results — execute full agent team plan with 6 parallel agents. Data observations (items 8-12) are NOT issues. Cordoba != Cordova. Option C for old UW model attributes. Auth login uses form data (not JSON). Kill servers: kill $(lsof -ti :5173) $(lsof -ti :8000). docs/multifamily_data_guide.docx should NOT be deleted.

Zod: .nullable().optional() + ?? undefined (NOT ?? 0). TWO API CLIENTS: src/lib/api.ts (axios) + src/lib/api/client.ts (fetch). shadcn needs CSS vars in :root + tailwind mappings. KPICard: treatZeroAsNA prop (default true). Property detail: lazy enrichment via CRUDProperty.enrich_financial_data() — delegates to services/enrichment.py. Zod property schema expects full nested structure — backend must return 0s not null objects. SQLite tests: no server_default, datetime.now(UTC), StaticPool. _dec()/to_decimal() converts float->Decimal. _property_transforms.py: _is_placeholder_city() catches Unknown/submarkets-as-cities. F-047: client.ts returns null as unknown as T for non-JSON, keep Promise<T> signature to avoid cascade. documents.property_id is now Integer FK (was VARCHAR). Type cascade lesson: changing model property types (e.g. string→number) cascades through schemas, CRUD, API, frontend types, hooks, filters, tests — UI filter types (strings from select components) must stay as strings even when data model changes. deploy.yml with workflow_run trigger caused spam — deleted, .disabled version remains.

LOCAL_DEALS_ROOT=/mnt/c/Users/MattBorgeson/OneDrive - B&R Capital/B&R Capital - Real Estate/Deals. Quick Extraction and Group Pipeline are INDEPENDENT systems writing to same extracted_values table. All 9 deferred groups extracted (66 files, 2,970 values). DB: 597,713 extracted values, 329 properties, 75 runs. 48 properties have city='Unknown' — resolved at transform layer.

Architecture review v2: 71/71 COMPLETE (69 Done + 2 Accepted Risk). CI: backend timeout=600s, -p no:randomly. Tracking: docs/findings-and-recommendations.md. Total tests: 3,804 (2,538 backend + 1,266 frontend). Alembic head: c5d6e7f8a9b0 (chain: 7c415cc1b77a → a3b8f1c2d4e5 F-041 → b4c5d6e7f8a9 F-018 → c5d6e7f8a9b0 F-042). NEXT: Extract 28 ungrouped files, production hosting (Oracle Cloud Free Tier or Hetzner CX22), mobile/iOS, security audit.

realtime_memories.content: All findings resolved. Ready to commit and push when you say go.
